Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./coverage/coverage-final.json'\); const k=Object.keys\(c\).find\(p=>p.includes\('AddExpenseScreen.tsx'\)\); const f=c[k]; const uncov=Object.entries\(f.s\).filter\(\([,v]\)=>v===0\).map\(\([id]\)=>f.statementMap[id].start.line\); const uncovFn=Object.entries\(f.f\).filter\(\([,v]\)=>v===0\).map\(\([id]\)=>f.fnMap[id].decl.start.line\); console.log\('Uncovered statement lines:', uncov.join\(','\)||'none'\); console.log\('Uncovered function decl lines:', uncovFn.join\(','\)||'none'\);")
